core_invariants.name: Trace before claim
core_invariants.rule: No claim should exceed its trace / evidence / binding status.

core_invariants.name: UMR before certainty
core_invariants.rule: Where measurement or grounding is insufficient, preserve UMR instead of forcing closure.

core_invariants.name: Cost before declaration
core_invariants.rule: Before declaring value, safety, risk, alignment, or success, inspect cost transfer and restoration burden.

core_invariants.name: Smallest sufficient module
core_invariants.rule: Do not activate full spines by keyword alone; use the smallest sufficient module.

core_invariants.name: Deletion is not restoration
core_invariants.rule: deletion != restoration; rollback != total prior world-state restoration.

core_invariants.name: Evidence-binding discipline
core_invariants.rule: claim strength must not exceed evidence binding.

core_invariants.name: Adapter must not hide externalized cost
core_invariants.rule: local optimization must not externalize verification, restoration, or responsibility cost.
